programme.title: Hart 220
programme.desc: Hart 220

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: As the 14th Precinct eagerly awaits the results of their shared lottery ticket Cagney and Lacey risk their careers by helping a suspended officer crack an illegal gun ring

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: Starsky risks his badge to nurse back to health and sobriety a former classmate now an alcoholic fashion model who is also the only person who can describe a homicidal burglar which is why that killer is determined to see her dead

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: While visiting a friend Hawke excuses himself to get a cup of coffee In his absence his friend and the secretary are executed mob style Hawke is shot but manages to escape Santini Air is ravaged in a search for something that as yet has not been disclosed A bug is found in the phone at Santini Air and is immediately destroyed Somehow the villains still manage to track Hawke to the place he is hiding After meeting with Archangel Hawke learns his friend was a double agent Hawke was given a ticket to a local art show which his friend gave him refusing to take no for an answer It is discovered that his ticket stub contains a micro dot with top secret blueprints Again the villains somehow know that he is at that art show without being told and also know his ticket stub contains the micro dot During Hawkes and his female friends escape she secretly drops the stub into the drawing box for a giveaway that was to occur at the end of the show Both proceed to Airwolf where they hastily eliminate the baddies

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Friday the 13th The Series

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The teams work with the anger management specialist starts to pay off with disastrous consequences Sonia and Froy drive to the country to repo a tractor and are forced to confront a group of irate corporate hayriders Lou and Sonia wrangle with a confused lady who is missing both her car and her sense of decency and Matt and Sonia get into a Mexican standoff with a wealthy divorcee his daughter and her rageaholic boyfriend

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy crash the meeting of a fraternal lodge to ask for a car but instead they get an angry old man with a rifle Froy and Matt go on a repo that turns into a battle royale

programme.title: Trail Street
programme.desc: Bat Mastersons old friend Billy Burns convinces him to become marshal of Liberal Kansas and help the residents fight drought and a destructive range war

programme.title: The Fastest Gun Alive
programme.desc: In the western frontier town of Cross Creek storekeeper George Temple is a polite and soft spoken man with a secret past When 3 bank robbers on the lam stop in town to change horses Georges past comes back to haunt him

programme.title: Addams 206
programme.desc: Addams 206

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E28
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E28

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa Luke Kate Hassie and Little Luke McCoy travel from Smokey Corners West Virginia to California They take over an inherited farm and everyone loves it but Grandpa who has trouble adjusting to the new place

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The wives horn in on Wilbur and Rogers duck hunting trip

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Rogers brother-in-law is begging Wilbur to write a follow-up hit song to Pretty Little Filly He wants it to be a blues number so Wilbur does his best to get Ed in a depressed mood

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While on a train trip Lucas and Mark are threatened by an escaped murderer As if that werent bad enough the train is suddenly caught in a huge cloud of grasshoppers forcing it to stop

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While North Fork excitedly awaits the arrival of a new preacher Mark uncovers evidence that suggests the new parson is not only not a preacher but may in face be planning to use the occasion to rob the town bank

programme.title: Gunsmoke S09E30 The Promoter
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S09E30 The Promoter

programme.title: Bonanza 302
programme.desc: Bonanza 302

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: As they ride through the forest Jim West and Artemus Gordon notice the unusual lack of vegetation and animal life They are suddenly approached by a giant knight who takes them to a large tent There West and Gordon meet a miniature Robin Hood who is really the evil Dr Miguelito Loveless in disguise Loveless wants to control the Indians as he starves them by killing their food with his lethal green powder

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When a man is arrested for possession of illegal pills he provides information that may help him at trial The information leads Friday and Gannon to a home used as a pill making factory and the detectives must try to locate the man running the factory

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While fleeing authorities Dr Kimble discovers a man who is deathly ill and is also being pursued by the law

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to No More Mr Nice Guy the twin daughters of the cop who killed Freddy find that whenever one is attacked by the man of their dreams the other is wounded So the sisters team up to try to get Freddy out of their dreams for good

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A conniving con-man posing as a salesman gets more than he bargained for when he comes knocks at the door of the wrong family

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Wealthy and successful middle-aged businessman Leo Burns suspects that his much younger wife Bridget is having an extramarital affair Leo hires sleazy private investigator GG Devoe to find out the identity of Bridgets lover

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: The Parisian underworld clashes with a greedy developer whose plans are not in line with theirs

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Bogus preacher Brother Charles preys upon the misfortune of attractive young homeless women by leading them toward prostitution under the guise of spreading brotherly love The fake priests scam comes to a sudden halt when mysterious stigmata appear on the hands of his latest flock member Alice Ames as she performs her mission

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick and Natalie are puzzled by the rapid aging of a murder victim

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan track down a box used to perform a dangerous magic trick

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Billys mother has remarried She Billy and his new stepfather move into their new house on Mothers Day The house is in Springwood The stepfather has a difficult temper and Billy wants more attention from his mother As soon as they arrive they leave Billy alone since they are going on their honeymoon Then he meets his new neighbor the beautiful Barbara who convinces him to organize a party whose outcome will be fatal Meanwhile a radio psychologist finds herself in trouble when she gives bad advice to her listeners She is Barbaras mother and is obsessed with her job as a radio celebrity and needs to put her daughter first

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Japanese soldier arrives on the island thinks its still WWII and holds the castaways prisoner on their own island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Kate are upset when Luke sells food on credit to a failing restaurant run by a widow and her daughter but the McCoy patriarch softens his no credit stance considerably when he learns that the proprietress is attractive and spunky

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys are initially honored by a visit from supposedly pro-farmer Congressional candidate Jim Slade but they decide to turn the tables when they learn that he has never been a farmer and is interested mainly in self-aggrandizement

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: As a crazy Army officer Max tries to prove that a psychiatrist is passing on confidential information to KAOS

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: CONTROL must track down the secret journal of a retired secret agent

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ helps a pregnant lady who has some very incriminating evidence against the evil sheriff Nathan McCandles on Christmas Eve

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: After Clint Eastwood moves into the neighborhood Mister Ed sets up a party line with his house which causes nothing but problems for Mr Eastwood

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: A going-on-15-year-old boy-crazy girl has moved into the neighborhood

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Col Hogan is less than thrilled when he is assigned to help an obnoxious American general flee Stalag 13 - and the secret plan involving a prisoner swap winds up as trying and difficult as the arrogant escapee himself

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: When the gangs hidden cache of money - needed to purchase a secret map - goes up in smoke the men of Stalag 13 must come up with a way to replace the cash - and decide to pull off a bank heist in the nearby town

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Complications develop when McHale and the 73 crew go after a Japanese pilot known as Washing Machine Charlie who has been attacking the Taratupa base on a daily basis

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton suspects McHale and the 73 Crew of consorting with the enemy when a Japanese radio announcer broadcasts personal details about Binghamton that only someone close to him would know

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A trouble maker transfers into the platoon and decides to make Pyle his patsy Gomer tries to handle it with understanding and kindness - but soon learns that bullies need to be stood up against

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After being bawled out by Sgt Carter for not working hard enough Gomer decides not accept his pay for that week which causes all sorts of troubles for Sgt Carter

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A bank robber comes to the island to hide from the authorities and holds the castaways prisoner while he waits for his boat after his cover is blown

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: When several people including Bea are attacked by a person wearing black Dan sets out to find out who and why Eventually he learns that Bea and all the other victims just came from a vacation in Mexico As Dan searches for the killer and other possible victims he meets a reporter who wants to do a story Dan reluctantly lets her join him

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: The Harts receive a last-minute invitation to the wedding of Jonathans old girlfriend and discover she is being forced into the marriage

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Stef and Michael plan to go to Morocco when Stef and Joanna become best friends Stef wants her and Dick to go too Dick was there in the Army and got sick from the food and doesnt want to go but Joanna talks him into going

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Larry runs for mayor

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Due to budget cutbacks General Craig assigns Gunny a temporary assistant Sgt Tammi Rae Perkins whom immediately goes about undercutting Gunny and trying to win the staffs attention

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways try to contact two astronauts in a space capsule orbiting over the island but they fail However they may get a second chance when an unmanned capsule they are trying to make contact with lands on the island

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch and Ryan investigate the disappearance of Teague with the help of a man who claims to have been tracking aliens for several years and knows that they are here on Earth planning world domination

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Armed with the belief that he is now co-owner of the business Matt starts making some big business calls - is this the beginning of a new chapter for the team or the beginning of its undoing

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The confusion over Lous new business relationship with Matt continues to mount Matt and Froy find themselves in a nice neighborhood on a mission to repossess a security car from the worlds most bumbling guards Sonia Lyndah and Matt hit the dock in an effort to reclaim an extremely expensive racing boat from its extremely offensive owner and Lou Froy and Matt go on a mission to the backwoods to snag a total of five cars away from a group of misguided daredevil teenagers

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: While stopped at the Boars Nest Loretta Lynn is kidnapped by a trio who want her to offer tips about breaking into the music business

programme.title: Hercules 219
programme.desc: Hercules 219

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Padar is a fierce battle game where spectators can connect via a jack patch that Liam suspects is causing neurological damage to users When a Padar warrior dies it raises even more questions about the safety

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens plan to clone a popular motivational speaker in order to control the minds of the rich and powerful Suzanne and Harrison plan to capture an alien drone

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arrested for a murder he did not commit Wills situation looks desperate when his attorney turns out to be a crooked prosecutor with ambitions to rise to the senate Can Alec help prove his friends innocence

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Tressas estranged sister arrives unwittingly bringing danger with her As a class 5 hurricane rages will Alec be able to save his human friends

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans land on the planet Arkadia where glyphs suggest it is the cradle of civilisation from which life on Earth began Now it is desolate and Koenig feels it is unsuitable for colonisation Two renegade crew members have other ideas however and take Helena hostage in their demands to settle on Arkadia

programme.title: The Forest
programme.desc: A cannibal hermit living in the woods preys on campers and hikers for his food supply

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes the Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke assist Texas ranger Jude Emery in tracking down hardened criminal Snake Harmon But they must rely on a little help from their friends as well as Boss and Sheriff Byrd when they find themselves kidnapped by Harmons henchmen

programme.title: Young 315
programme.desc: Young 315

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A schizophrenic nightclub entertainer dresses up as a famous torch singer

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: An opposition leader of an Eastern Bloc nation has been captured by the chief of the countrys secret police Also seized was microfilm with a list of people who secretly support the opposition Phelps develops a plan that plays upon the astrology obsession the nations leader has Cinnamon poses as a famous astrologer while Barney and Rollin will have to operate from the cargo compartment of a plane transporting the captured opposition leader

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to track down the driver who hit and run with a pedestrian

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives break up a gambling ring Friday is undercover

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While working as a delivery driver Kimble rescues a man and a woman from the wreckage of a small airplane All three have a problem the man is a politician the woman is not his wife and Kimble doesnt want publicity as the rescuer

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: A dying prisoner asks his son to kill the two people whose testimony caused his death a Stockton banker named Clark and Victoria Barkley After Clark is murdered Jarrod unaware that Victoria is the next target agrees to act as the sons lawyer when he is put on trial for murder

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: A school teacher claims to have killed a bank robber The townspeople want to celebrate their new hero It all starts to unravel as his past catches up with him and the people hes lived with want nothing else to do with him

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.desc: Lets Go Thailand Thailand Into the South Ep 030

programme.title: The Scarlet and The Black
programme.desc: Vatican efforts led by Monsignor Hugh OFlaherty to save Allied POWs and downed Allied airmen as the Nazis invade Rome

programme.title: KILL ROMMEL
programme.desc: During WWII US Lieutenant Morris and British captain Hull are assigned in a mission to kill Rommel

programme.title: Hell Boats
programme.desc: An American commander serving under the British Royal Navy in 1942 is assigned to blockade the island of Malta and told to formulate a plan to destroy the Nazi arsenal in Sicily

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: Brotherhood of Justice
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves Kiefer Sutherland and Billy Zane star as high-school students who start a vigilante group to combat crime in their neighborhood

programme.title: Billionaire Boys Club
programme.desc: Ron Levin a wealthy businessman has disappeared No body is found but there was a list with instructions in his house - a recipe for murder Its author Joe Hunt is the defendant The successful young business man had formed a team of prestigious former fellow students for a risky project which should make them all rich His partners claim they didnt know about the means

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to No More Mr Nice Guy the twin daughters of the cop who killed Freddy find that whenever one is attacked by the man of their dreams the other is wounded So the sisters team up to try to get Freddy out of their dreams for good

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A conniving con-man posing as a salesman gets more than he bargained for when he comes knocks at the door of the wrong family

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Billys mother has remarried She Billy and his new stepfather move into their new house on Mothers Day The house is in Springwood The stepfather has a difficult temper and Billy wants more attention from his mother As soon as they arrive they leave Billy alone since they are going on their honeymoon Then he meets his new neighbor the beautiful Barbara who convinces him to organize a party whose outcome will be fatal Meanwhile a radio psychologist finds herself in trouble when she gives bad advice to her listeners She is Barbaras mother and is obsessed with her job as a radio celebrity and needs to put her daughter first

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre
programme.desc: With her parents out of town high school senior Trish decides to throw a slumber party but things go downhill when an escaped killer wielding a power drill is loose in the neighbourhood

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Phil Melissa Mitch Mary and Vinnie are high school friends who unwittingly raise the dead on Halloween night Once the dead have returned Pitchford Cove will never be the same againor will it

programme.title: Demons
programme.desc: A group of random people are invited to a screening of a mysterious movie only to find themselves trapped in the theater with ravenous demons

programme.title: Theater of Blood
programme.desc: A Shakespearean actor takes poetic revenge on the critics who denied him recognition

programme.title: Attack of the Giant Leaches
programme.desc: Fear grips a nondescript city after its residents disappear mysteriously from across the town Surprisingly a gamekeeper stumbles upon the role of blood-sucking leeches behind the disappearances

programme.title: The Malik Spellman Interview

programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Carribbean superstar K Victoria Hear how shes changing the world with her music

programme.title: The Chef Felicia Grady Cooking Special
programme.desc: World renown chef Ms Felicia Grady stops by the show to cook a delicious meal for the crew

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: The Empress Interview
programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: With a few clues and a little conjuring Gillian produces a map showing the destination of the original Lightning League that disappeared years ago In a far off place untouched by Saw Boss Jayce is disgusted to find them playing war games

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The powerful liberty stone protects Aloar from all invaders by creating the spidereen whirlpool Gillian brings the league to this planet to see his old magician friend Axilar and to use the stone to seek Audrics whereabouts

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM steals the famous Lippizaner Stallions earning 4 million in platinum bars from an Arab At the end VENOM loses the money by a laser shot from Shark and they all quickly flee in Piranha

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM is manipulating a tribe of aboriginals with holographic projections of flying rocks The aboriginals think its their god Mimi VENOM is after the secret treasure chamber of Mimi Scott and T-Bob get mixed up with the aboriginals when they think T-Bob is representing their Mimi god At the end Brad saves the day with his hocus pocus mask

programme.desc: Rescue! The Jupiter Crew

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dr Wily creates an android that is a replica of Kevins worst enemy from high school

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain challenges the N-Team to an athletic competition on Mount Icarus thus distracting them from stopping her from finding the Three Sacred Treasures

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The beautiful MAD agent Labella is disrupting the peaceful country of Pianostan Inspector Gadget stops her before she causes a revolution Safety Tip Dont eat food that looks old or bad; prevent food poisoning

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The famous Emerald Duck is stolen from the temple of the Sungod Inspector Gadget exposed the criminal and restores order

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Guardians set out to uncover the Renegade spy in their midst

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Guardians move to stop Cy-Kills latest scheme stealing cargo-laden freighters to secure the materials he needs to build an undersea base
